meaning: 哈里斯[英国苏格兰西北部一地区];tweed[纺]海力斯粗花呢
examples: I think Mr Harris is at lunch.
Mr Harris and Mrs Bate and three other teachers were there.
The task fell to Mr. Harris to deliver this bad news. It was gracelessly done.
This ruling prompted Harris to demand written statements from the counties explaining their reasons for recounting.
Tesco, for its part, says it has never hidden its involvement with Harris and Hoole.
